animations.title: Pixel Sunset Beach
animations.description: Animated pixel art beach scene with rolling waves, drifting clouds, birds, crabs, jellyfish, and bioluminescent ocean. Includes a day/night toggle that smoothly transitions the full scene.

animations.title: Pixelated Text Generator
animations.description: Interactive text animation that renders any word as a swarm of colored dots flowing with a wave shimmer effect. Customize dot size, spacing, speed, direction, color palette, and shape in real time. Hover to scatter dots with your cursor.

animations.title: Bubble Clock
animations.description: A real-time analog clock suspended inside a liquid glass soap bubble, rendered in Three.js. The bubble drifts and bounces around the viewport with jelly physics, colliding with a crowd of smaller glass bubbles. Features thin-film iridescence, dynamic reflection and refraction, frosted blur, and tap-to-pop bursts.
